Video.summary: “Part of our responsibility as citizens in this country is to make sure we not only take care of these resources but we hand it off to the next generation in better condition that we found it.” -Bob Ziehmer, Senior Director of Conservation for Bass Pro Shops & Cabela's Join Bob in New Mexico as he talks about taking care of our natural resources for future generations. Special thanks to Express UU Bar Ranch
Video.title: RMEF - "Better Than We Found It"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: The team puts rubber to pavement and heads north to Montana. Tune in as they hit prime Fall fishing with the team at Fins & Feathers and get an inside look at the Adipose Boatworks shop. The excitement doesn’t end there as the team gets challenged by serious mechanical problems with the Fly Shop Tour van and wind up stranded in Montana.
Video.title: "STRANDED in Montana! (It could be worse)"

Video.summary: Leaving the van behind the team hits the road and finds themselves in Twin Bridges, Montana where they link up with Dan “Rooster” Leavens of Stonefly Outfitters for some of the best brown trout fishing you can find. The crew wraps up their visit to Montana with a trip to the team at Madison River Fishing Co. and an event to raise funds for the local Trout Unlimited chapter at MAP Brewing.
Video.title: "The BEST Trout Fishing in the Lower 48"

Image.alt: "The BEST Trout Fishing in the Lower 48"
"The BEST Trout Fishing in the Lower 48"
"The BEST Trout Fishing in the Lower 48"

Video.summary: Kyle Green meets up with his friends at the National Wild Turkey Federation to dive into turkey conservation, and hunt the largest subspecies of wild turkey. Kyle finishes off this episode with his most favorite wild game recipe, boneless wild turkey wings.
Video.title: "The Great Eastern Turkey"

Video.summary: Kyle Green heads to Yankton, South Dakota to learn about the history of the Missouri river and the people who count on the river for sustenance. The invasive carp are set to destroy this rich ecosystem and Kyle aims to stop this fish with his best weapon, a great recipe.
Video.title: "Invasive Carp Disaster"

Video.summary: Kyle Green explores the 10,000 islands off the West Coast of Florida on his Sea-Doo while trying to catch fish after red tide. If the idea of camping off the grid, only eating what you catch, and discovering remains of thousand-year-old civilizations excites you, this is an episode you won't want to miss.
Video.title: "The Mysterious 10,000 Islands"

Video.summary: Josh Dahlke grabs a TenPoint crossbow and kicks back on "Island Time," along with the Nashville rockers from Loose Lips.
Video.title: "Island Time"

Video.summary: Join Will Cooper on an unforgettable adventure in the Colorado mountains, where he dedicated three years chasing elusive bull elk without success. Determined to turn the tide, Will enlists the expertise of his good friend Jermaine Hodge, prior World Elk Calling Champion and Wrestling Coach for the United States Army World Class Athlete Program. Together, they face challenges and overcome adversity during a thrilling public land over-the-counter rifle hunt. Experience the highs and lows of their journey against the stunning backdrop of Colorado's wilderness.
Video.title: "Coach"

Video.summary: The positive impact made by the shooting sports and recreational shooting to people across our country can’t be measured in just one story, so we have three. In Florida, Olympian Dania Vizzi trains at her home shooting facility and talk about how she went from ballerina to one of the best shotgun shooters in the world. In Nebraska, firearms instructor Thea Van Syoc has used the disciplines of competitive pistol shooting and training to help shape her life. Finally we’ll take a look into the National African American Gun Association and learn how one day at the range for Phillip Smith created the fastest growing firearm organization in the United States.
Video.title: “Shooting is Life”

Video.summary: Capt. Mike joins a local legend in the waters of Amelia Island, exploring its rich fishery and targeting redfish, trout, and more in this coastal gem.
Video.title: "Amelia Angler"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike joins Capt. Ozzie in Captiva, FL where the action is fast and furious and they chase down an inshore slam in this beautiful Florida fishery.
Video.title: "Captiva Slam"

Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss is in Columbia, South Carolina, fishing with Captain Justin McGrady for the elusive freshwater Striped Bass.
Video.title: "Reelin' Rapids"

Video.summary: C.A. joins Rhett Morris in Charlotte Harbor for an inshore slam adventure in one of Florida’s most productive estuaries.
Video.title: "Harbor Master"

Video.summary: CA and Marlin head to the beautiful waters of Tarpon Springs for cobia and trout.
Video.title: "Cobia Co-Op"

Video.summary: Week 2 of the Tropic Star Inshore Seminars features guests targeting a plethora of species in the life rich waters surrounding the lodge.
Video.title: "Tropic Star Inshore Seminar 2"

Video.summary: JP adapts a BC Salmon Twitchin’ Jig technique to Northern Smallmouth Bass in gin clear waters.
Video.title: "Power Fluff Smallmouth"

Video.summary: With very cold water temperatures early in the season, JP focuses on downsizing his crankbait and setup to get bit.
Video.title: "Cold Water Finesse Cranking"

Video.summary: JP sneaks out for a late afternoon fish looking to catch whatever will bite using a micro drop shot set up.
Video.title: "Micro Dropshotting"

Video.summary: Billy Yargus is hunting Eastern's in Missouri and shares some tips and techniques for calling turkeys in open country. Some great call sequences on display as 4 big gobblers make their way to Billy across a wide open field.
Video.title: "OPEN COUNTRY CALLING"

Video.summary: Champion caller Scott Ellis is in South Florida Osceola country! They are hunting a small oak head adjacent to an orange grove. The thick cover means you have to be setup perfectly, which is a guessing game and will test your patience. Tons of gobbling and turkey action but Scott has to get sneaky to get this old longbeard to break and come in close.
Video.title: "KING KONG OSCEOLA"

Video.summary: Welcome to Season 2 of Turkey Ninja presented by WoodHaven! It's opening day of youth season in Alabama and Mike and Jacob are ready to work on some longbeards! Right off the roost turkeys are in sight and put on quite a show for Jacob who is trying to punch a tag on his 39th "Shrutter"!
Video.title: "OPENING DAY 'SHRUTTER"

Video.summary: Rarely does a turkey hunt go as planned and sometimes the missed opportunities will leave you second guessing everything you know about turkeys, hunting and life in general. Mark Scroggins and son Colten are hunting hard in Mississippi with plenty of turkey action but the cards seemed to be stacked against them.
Video.title: "AS CLOSE AS IT GETS"

Video.summary: After years of chasing one of the oldest and most elusive bucks he's ever encountered, Phillip Vanderpool uses the WoodHaven Initmidator grunt call to finally gets his shot at Tinman, a legendary 10.5-year-old buck in Kansas.
Video.title: "Hunting a 10 1/2 YEAR OLD BUCK"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike and Capt. Glenn Taylor fish their home waters and pay tribute to dear friend Capt. Billy Nobles.
Video.title: "Home Waters"

Video.summary: Capt Mike meets up with Leiza Fitzgerald and Jimmy Huddleston for a star tournament redfish tag mission.
Video.title: "Ozona Tag Team"

Video.summary: CA and Trevor field test some new Flats Class Exclusive Rods.
Video.title: "Two-Timing Trevor"

Video.summary: CA heads to the northern regions of the Nature Coast for a multi-species day.
Video.title: "Pressure Makes Diamonds"

Video.summary: Captains Jonathan Moss and Josh Greer are fishing for south Florida’s exotics amongst the alligators of the Florida Everglades.
Video.title: "Alligator Alley"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss shares the skiff with the creator of D.O.A. Lures, Capt. Mark Nichols, in Stuart, Florida.
Video.title: “Mr. D.O.A.”

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss is fishing one of his favorite Central Florida Lakes for Largemouth Bass!
Video.title: “Notorious L.M.B..”

Video.summary: Kris Seymour chases big whitetails in NE Kansas!
Video.title: "Kansas Whitetails"

Video.summary: It's turkey time and The Bearded Buck crew is going on a tour! Starting in Florida, Jerry and Austin are hunting Osceolas with Jeff Budz. From there, Jerry and Cud are headed out to hunt with our good friend, Ron Kendra, in his home state of Virginia. To finish things off, Jerry is meeting up with good friends, David "Bunch" Hale and Dan Thurston, in Kansas.
Video.title: The - "Annual Turkey Tour"

Video.summary: In this episode, Mark Peterson finds himself deep in the heart of Peru and focuses on completing the prestigious South America Upland Slam. With only one bird remaining, the Western Peruvian Dove, the trip has led him to a private hunting property. This final challenge will take place over a cut cornfield, a favorite spot for the doves. To blend in, Mark and his team craft a makeshift blind using a mix of corn stalks, and timber, just enough cover while allowing for a clear shot. These West Peruvian Doves are known for their erratic flight patterns, often bouncing from one tree to another in a random manner, making timing and placement critical.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Peru Part 2"

Video.summary: The hunt for FREAK SHOW became a thrilling adventure after I spotted him on Cabela’s trail cam. Having hunted Kentucky for over a decade and established my own properties—Bootleggers Ridge and Stonewall Plantation—I was eager for the chance at such a remarkable deer. Despite having drawn a coveted caribou tag through Worldwide Trophy Adventures’ TAGS Program, the allure of FREAK SHOW was too strong to resist. After careful planning and waiting for the right wind, I finally - set out on September 11. With my crossbow in hand, I waited anxiously in the stand, my heart racing as the shadows lengthened. Just when I thought the evening might end without a sighting, a movement caught my eye, sending my pulse soaring. With caution, FREAK SHOW appeared.
Video.title: "Freak Show - Largest Buck I’ve Ever Encountered"

Image.alt: "Freak Show - Largest Buck I’ve Ever Encountered"
"Freak Show - Largest Buck I’ve Ever Encountered"
"Freak Show - Largest Buck I’ve Ever Encountered"

Video.summary: Continuing on with his quest for The North America Deer Slam, Mark Peterson packs his Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle for a hunt in Mexico targeting the elusive Mexican Texanus Whitetail from elevated blinds. The outfitter here has done an amazing job managing the deer numbers and age groups to grow giant whitetails. Mark is anticipating the pre-rut will get these big bucks moving.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: Kyle Green and his buddy Jeremy set out on a buffalo hunt in the great state of Oklahoma. Along the way they learn about the true past and potential future of the American Buffalo from several interesting people with different perspectives.
Video.title: "Bison Bison Bison"

Video.summary: Explore Pakistan's wilderness with Dan Cabela as he treks the rugged mountains, in search of ibex and urial, and learns about the community conservation model that has protected these species.
Video.title: "Community Conservation in Pakistan"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken Letchworth set out on a new adventure, exploring food fishing and the great outdoors. This father son duo are making memories that will last a lifetime and will forever be etched in the digital world.
Video.title: "The Beginning"

Video.summary: New. York. City. That’s where our host Josh Rosen kicks off his journey in Episode 4—and where he lived for 16 years and started up the surf-centric apparel brand, Saturdays NYC. Back in his old stomping grounds, Josh first meets up with the award-winning chef and Mumbai native, Chintan Pandya, currently blowing up the New York food scene with his unapologetic and authentic Indian cuisine (pro tip: try the goat brains). Next, Josh travels through the boroughs, heads upstate, and along the coast to source local ingredients—from sake brewers and pig farmers to catching fresh lobster just 100 miles from Wall Street. As always the adventure will end with a feast, right back in Chintan’s kitchen.
Video.title: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"
DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"
DIRT - "Exploring New York City's Hidden Culinary Gems: Cooking Goat Brains, Lobster & MORE"

Video.summary: In Stomping Grounds Episode 5, our crew follows the road all the way down to where it ends on the tropical sun-baked island of Key West at the southern tip of the Florida Keys. Surrounded by water, Key West is a boater's paradise with historic seaports and marinas offering a bustling waterfront with historic schooners, dive boats, sport fishing charters, parasailing adventures and scenic coastal excursions. Host Ryan McVinney hops aboard a custom hybrid diesel-electric power catamaran with solar panels, called "Squid" for an in-depth eco-tour of Key West National Wildlife Refuge, including snorkeling in a sponge garden with tropical fish. Next a quick stop in Dry Tortugas National Park via the 110-foot Gladding Hearn power catamaran the "Yankee Freedom III" to visit historic Fort Jefferson, then we jump on a 2020 Sea Hunt 255 Ultra for a ride through the dolphin playground to a secret local boating spot known as Snipe Keys with pristine white sandbars. Back in town we we board the Nau Santa Maria - a replica of Christopher Columbus' sailboat. Finally we head 50 miles offshore to ply the wakes of the shrimp boats with fishing charter captain Chris Trosset aboard his Contender 35ST center console boat.
Video.title: "Key West - A Boater's Paradise"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team - showcases structural fiberglass repairs and teak refinishing on various project boats, including non-skid walkway applications.
Video.title: Essentials - "Advanced Fiberglass Repairs & Teak Replacement Options"

Image.alt: Essentials - "Advanced Fiberglass Repairs & Teak Replacement Options"
Essentials - "Advanced Fiberglass Repairs & Teak Replacement Options"
Essentials - "Advanced Fiberglass Repairs & Teak Replacement Options"

Video.summary: Josh and Anna set out for a last minute fishing trip that runs a little late. They take a quick detour to the parent pick up line to get the kids from school, and head back out on the water to see what’s biting!
Video.title: "Family Time"

Video.summary: Josh takes his friend Isaiah to the blue water as they look for destin's latest hot bite, the blackfin tuna.
Video.title: "Tuna Tataki"

Video.summary: Josh and George from Two Georges Marina battle the wind and tide on a tough day of fishing which leads Josh to fish another day, solely for revenge on the Sheepshead!
Video.title: "Two Georges Marina"

Video.summary: Join Captain Josh and Sheriff Eric Aden for a day of fishing and fun in Destin, Florida. These two friends hit the water, catching fish both offshore and inshore, and reeling in some impressive catches. With plenty of laughs, great stories, and a few surprises along the way, this episode is all about the joy of fishing and the bond between two guys who love the sea.
Video.title: "Hook, Line & Sheriff"

Video.summary: Join the Mayor of Destin as he ventures into the world of coastal fishing, leaving the city behind for a day of fun and unexpected challenges. With plenty of laughs and surprising twists, this episode showcases the Mayor in a whole new light.
Video.title: "Reel Politics"

Video.summary: Experience the magic of shore diving from one of the Keys’ most scenic beaches. The episode also follows military veterans discovering healing and renewed purpose through diving.
Video.title: "Lower Key - Big Pine Key"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson is in the final stretch of completing the South America Upland Slam. Having already checked off nine species in Argentina, he now finds himself in Peru, where he faces the challenge of tracking down two elusive species to complete his list: the Andean Tinamou and the Western Peruvian Dove.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Peru"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson is in Ethiopia hunting Mountain Nyala. After the first two days, Mark has taken a Menelik’s Bushbuck and a Colobus Monkey but no Mountain Nyala. Finally, on Day 3 the hunting party receives the green light from the military to hunt in the area they wanted. It's time to put the Gunwerks rifle to the test.
Video.title: "Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"

Image.alt: "Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"
"Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"
"Mountain Nyala and Bohor Reedbuck - Ethiopia: Part Two"

Video.summary: Mark Scroggins and his family are in Oklahoma and spot a big gobbler from the road. They are pretty sure they can get in position to call him in but they have to be quick without being seen. His step-daughter Destiny is behind the trigger and Mark just about puts this ol gobbler in her lap!
Video.title: "HEART ATTACK TURKEY HUNT"

Video.summary: Four strutters have been located and Mark has a plan to slip into the ideal position to call them in. He's decided to hunt with his son's .410 loaded with Turkey Ninja TSS.
Video.title: "A STORM IS COMING"

Video.summary: In Missouri, we join Avery Epperson on the home farm with one goal in mind—catching up with a legendary buck known as Old Monroe. It doesn’t take long before the hunt heats up as the crew spots their target and works to grunt him into bow range. Hunting over a lush green plot on the home farm, Avery gets the chance every whitetail hunter dreams of.
Video.title: "Old Monroe"

Video.summary: Mike is back after em in Alabama and finally finds a tone that this ol gobbler seems to like. Some timely calling and waiting patiently for this longbeard and his hen to make their way to his setup pays off. Back to work Mike, we have calls to make! It's the WoodHaven Way!
Video.title: "CALLING GOBBLERS"
